text:
- [escalation] Rich Lang: Rich Lang (father) forwards a blog post about 'The Death of America as a Superpower' recommending it as best analysis.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification that the Jeeves Daily Pipeline workflow run failed for jeeves-unchained repository.
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Jeeves pipeline alert for permanent failure due to 429 rate limiting on the Daily pipeline.
- [escalation] Rich Lang: Rich Lang forwarded a blog article about manufacturing that reminded him of Michael's views.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification that the Jeeves Daily Pipeline workflow run failed.
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Jeeves pipeline alert for permanent failure due to 429 rate limiting on the daily pipeline.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification that the Jeeves Weekly Audit Health Report workflow run completely failed.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification that the Jeeves Daily Pipeline workflow run failed.
- [escalation] lang.mc@gmail.com: Automated alert about a permanent failure in the Jeeves Daily Pipeline due to a 429 rate limit error.
- [escalation] Google: Google security alert that a linked Google Account is no longer recoverable.
